name: Bluetooth Devices & Radio Configuration
categoryDescription: Hardware device connection history — USB storage, Bluetooth, portable devices, and imaging hardware.
description: Bluetooth radio configuration and previously paired device records — device MAC addresses, device names, link keys (pairing data), and service UUIDs.
forensic_value: Previously paired Bluetooth devices are recorded here even after un-pairing — MAC addresses and device names prove proximity between devices at some point. WidComm (Broadcom) stack maintains its own separate device database. Bluetooth-based attacks (e.g., Bluetooth implants) leave radio artifacts here.
